requirements.text: Create a valid Codex plugin project named codex-trace-miner.
Add seven requested skills with clear triggers, workflows, and outputs.
Add session-start, pre-tool-use, and stop hooks with conservative behavior.
Add optional MCP only for real read-only context.
Add source index, extracted patterns, operating protocol, eval plan, scorecard, and README.

validation.evidence: Trace Miner plugin validation passed on 2026-06-15

validation.command: python -m json.tool .codex-plugin/plugin.json; python -m json.tool hooks/hooks.json; python -m json.tool .mcp.json

validation.evidence: Returned get_source_index, get_extracted_patterns, get_operating_protocol, and get_eval_scorecard

changed_scope.reason: Source index, operating protocol, patterns, and scorecard

risks.description: Before/after behavior eval has not been run yet.
Some public source licenses/provenance need deeper review before extracting detailed patterns.

next_action: Initialize Git and commit the scaffold locally.
